title: Adenochlaena mallotiformis
taxonomy: Adenochlaena mallotiformis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This classification places it within the larger group of Pteridophyta, or vascular plants that produce spores. The family Dryopteridaceae is a group of ferns commonly known as the wood ferns or shield ferns, and is characterized by their distinctive fronds and sporangia. The classification of Adenochlaena mallotiformis is further supported by its morphological features, such as its leaf shape and arrangement. Its classification is a key aspect of understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of this species.
